prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! That task you've been circling all morning? It's time to tackle it. You've got this. You're strong, you're capable, and you're going to feel SO much better once it's done.

Just take that first step. Even a tiny one. Don't think about the finish line, just focus on *starting*. The momentum will build, and before you know it, you'll be on your way to conquering it. You've prepared for this, you have the skills, and you're ready to get it done. 

Let's go! You've got this!
